Sur La Table
terms:
Eligibility and Enrollment

Enrollment is limited. Eligible Card Members must first add offer to Card and then use same Card for qualifying spend. Only US-issued American Express® Cards are eligible.

Limit of 1 statement credit per eligible Card Member account. If the Card Account is canceled or past due, it may not qualify to receive a statement credit.

Qualifying Purchases

Offer valid in-store at Sur La Table and online only at US website surlatable.com. Valid at participating locations in the US. Not valid on purchases shipped outside of the US. See merchant website for shipping policy. Some merchants may not ship to all areas. Excludes Nespresso boutiques/coffee shops in Sur La Table stores and Culinary Journey Vacations. Offer valid only on purchases made in US dollars.

Offer only valid on purchases made directly with the merchant. Offer not valid on purchases made using third parties, such as resellers, delivery services, or other intermediaries.

Statement Credit

Please allow 90-days after 5/15/2025 for the statement credit(s) to be posted to the Account, provided that American Express receives information from the merchant about your qualifying purchase.

Participation in Amex Offers is subject to Amex Offers Program Terms.

POID: K9QZ:0002
long_description: Earn a one-time $15 statement credit after using your enrolled eligible Card to spend a minimum of $100 in one or more purchases in-store at Sur La Table or online at surlatable.com by 5/15/2025. See terms.
